name: mostParamGet
title: mostParamGet
syntax: double mostParamGet (mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[]); // form 1
double mostParamGet (mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], long arrayIndex); // form 2
description: Query of a parameter value from an AMS message using the parameter name from the XML function catalog.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message from which the parameter value should be read.

parameters.name: paramAdr
parameters.description: Identification of parameters (see symbolic identification of parameters).

parameters.name: arrayIndex
parameters.description: Parameter index in arrays or sequences. This declaration overwrites the indexing in the brackets of <paramAdr>.

return: Raw value of the parameter. No conversion formula is applied.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
